title: Rustlers of the Badlands
writer: Richard Hill Wilkinson, J. Benton Cheney
actors: Charles Starrett, Tex Harding, Dub Taylor
plot: Steve Lindsay, a civilian scout attached to the U.S. Cavalry, and his friend, Tex Harding, are assigned to investigate the murder of an Army lieutenant in connection with cattle rustling in Antelope Valley, New Mexico. After Tex a...
